title: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
snippet: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.

title: Father-of-8 killed in San Diego mosque shooting hailed as a hero
snippet: Security guard Amin Abdullah, one of three killed in the attack, was described as "a shining light".

snippet: Nadia Marcinko is relatively unknown but may soon be called before US legislators.

title: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff

title: Two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
snippet: The two were among four divers located in the furthest chamber in the cave and their bodies were recovered by specialist divers.

title: Jackson Pollock painting sells for record $181m at auction
snippet: The Abstract Expressionist's Number 7A, 1948 painting is now his most expensive artwork ever sold at auction.
